title: Redstone Tools
description: A redstone quality of life mod which adds features in the form of commands, WorldEdit extensions and more to make building with redstone easier.
body:
Redstone Tools aims to improve your redstone building workflow by giving you useful redstone related tools in the form of commands, WorldEdit extensions, macros and more.

 

Socials

If you have any questions about the mod, want to suggest new features, or just want to hang out, join our discord server!

 

Macros

Redstone Tools' Macro system is a system that lets users define and use macros which can be triggered by running a command or by pressing a keybind.

 

WorldEdit extensions

Redstone Tools adds a bunch of commands that interact with WorldEdit, take for example //minsel which minimizes your selection (removes all surrounding layers of air) or //read which reads a selection and interprets it as a binary number for easy debugging.
